buy_intro_c1: Ukuthenga i-Bitcoin okokuqala kungabonakala kunzima, kodwa empeleni kulula kakhulu uma ukuhlukanisa ngezinyathelo.
buy_intro_c2: Lo mhlahlandlela uzokuhamba ngenqubo yokuthenga i-Bitcoin ngokuphepha nokuyigcina esikhwameni sakho.
buy_step_1_description: Amazwe ahlukene anezinketho zokuthenga i-Bitcoin ezihlukene ezitholakalayo. Khetha izwe lakho ukuze ubone izinketho ezikahle kunazo zonke kuwe.
buy_step_2_description: Kukhona izindlela ezimbili eziyinhloko zokuthenga i-Bitcoin: ngokudlulisela ebhange noma ngemali engokoqobo. Ngayinye inezinzuzo ezihlukene.
buy_method_bank_description: Ukudlulisela ebhange yindlela evame kakhulu yokuthenga i-Bitcoin. Kusheshile, kulula, futhi ngokuvamile kunezimali eziphansi.
buy_method_cash_description: Ukuthenga ngemali engokoqobo kunikeza ukungasese okungcono kodwa kunezinketho ezimbalwa futhi kungadinga ukuhlangana nomuntu ngokuqondile noma ukusebenzisa i-Bitcoin ATM.
buy_step_3_description: Nazi izinketho ezinhle kakhulu zokuthenga i-Bitcoin ngezwe lakho nendlela yakho yokukhokha:
buy_platform_strike_description: I-Strike iyindlela esheshayo nelula kunazo zonke yokuthenga i-Bitcoin ngezimali eziphansi nokusekelwa okusheshayo kwe-Lightning Network.
buy_platform_swan_description: I-Swan Bitcoin igxile kuphela ezinsizakalweni ze-Bitcoin ngokutshalomali ngokuqhubekayo nemithombo yemfundo.
buy_platform_river_description: I-River inikeza ukuthenga kwe-Bitcoin, ukumba, nezinsizakalo zokugcina ezigxile emfundweni nasekuphepheni.
buy_platform_coinsquare_description: I-Coinsquare iyinkundla yaseCanada ye-Bitcoin enamandla okuhambelana nomthetho nokusekela amakhasimende.
buy_platform_kraken_description: I-Kraken iyinkundla ye-Bitcoin eqinile enezici zokuthenga ezithuthukile nokuphepha okuqinile.
buy_platform_atm_description: Ama-Bitcoin ATM akuvumela ukuthenga i-Bitcoin ngemali engokoqobo ngokushesha. Thola eyokuduze kuwe usebenzisa i-Coin ATM Radar.
buy_platform_bisq_description: I-Bisq iyinkundla engacentralized yontanga-ku-ntanga evumela ukuthengisa kwe-Bitcoin okuyimfihlo ngaphandle kwe-KYC.
buy_platform_relai_description: I-Relai iyihlelo lokusebenza le-Swiss ye-Bitcoin kuphela elinesikhwama sokuzigcinela, izici zokutshalomali ngokuzenzakalelayo, nezimali eziphansi kubasebenzisi base-Europe.
buy_step_4_c1: Ngemuva kokuthenga i-Bitcoin, isinyathelo esibaluleke kakhulu ukuyihambisa uyise esikhwameni sakho lapho ulawula okhiye bangasese.
buy_step_4_c2: Ukushiya i-Bitcoin ku-exchange kuyingozi ngoba awunayo ngempela i-Bitcoin - i-exchange iyinayo.
buy_step_4_c3: Lapho ulawula okhiye bakho bangasese, unobunini bangempela be-Bitcoin yakho futhi akekho ongayithatha kuwe.
buy_step_4_c4: Funda indlela yokukhetha isikhwama se-Bitcoin esikufanele:
